summary: All acceptance criteria verified. timeout_seconds parameter added to background_task tool, scheduleTimeout auto-cancels tasks after timeoutMs, worker skill docs updated with Never stall on subagents rule (timeout_seconds: 180s). 16 new unit tests pass. TypeScript type error in test file fixed (task.status cast). Pre-existing envoy/infra @pulumi/docker failures unrelated to this PR.

criteriaResults.criterion: Set maximum wait time for Oracle/subagent responses
criteriaResults.evidence: timeout_seconds parameter added to background_task tool in delegation-tool.ts; timeoutMs stored in BackgroundTask type
scheduleTimeout() in background-manager.ts auto-fails task with Timed out after Xs error message and aborts the session
SKILL.md rule 7 and workflow files (implement.md, architect.md, test.md) all updated with timeout_seconds: 180 and explicit skip-on-timeout instructions

regressions: None — 1281/1283 tests pass; 2 failures are pre-existing @pulumi/docker module-not-found errors in envoy/infra unrelated to this PR
fixesApplied: Fixed TypeScript type error in finalize.test.ts line 282: cast task.status as string for toBe matcher compatibility
